codeReview.summary: The original feature commit implements conflict-aware recall filtering, conflict-note surfacing, and capture-triggered recall-cache invalidation, and the follow-up fix commit directly closes the prior blocking gap by relaxing relatedness tests and attaching fresh approved-surface VAL-CROSS-002 disruption/recovery evidence. The rerun evidence shows a normal claweb reply during temporary disruption and a later recovered turn with muninn_auto_recall_hit, so the prior failure is adequately addressed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The current `.factory/services.yaml` claweb_frontdoor start command still documents `CLAWEB_UPSTREAM_TOKEN_FILE`, but the accepted Windows rerun proof required same-shell inline `CLAWEB_UPSTREAM_TOKEN` propagation to preserve frontdoor auth in startup logs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\.factory\services.yaml defines `CLAWEB_UPSTREAM_TOKEN_FILE`; `D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\tmp\same-shell-frontdoor-start.log` proves the successful rerun used inline `CLAWEB_UPSTREAM_TOKEN=claweb-local-20260317` with the intended `CLAWEB_LOGIN_CONFIG`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared environment knowledge still says the live Muninn MCP listener may reject initialization with `session not found`, but the final consolidation rerun evidence shows a newer local reality of `Unauthorized` for the broken startup path while the accepted recovery proof used REST-backed auto recall plus claweb logs rather than manual MCP success.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\.factory\library\environment.md mentions `session not found`; `D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\tmp\gateway-val-cross-002.log` shows the disrupted proof run, while `D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\tmp\same-shell-frontdoor-start.log` and `D:\tmp\claw\picoclaw\tmp\claweb-frontdoor-val-cross-002.log` capture the accepted path without relying on manual MCP tool success.

summary: Rerun passed: I reviewed the original feature diff, the fix feature diff, both relevant transcripts/handoffs, and the fresh claweb/frontdoor evidence. The fix feature resolves the prior missing VAL-CROSS-002 proof and also adds focused cache-relatedness regression coverage, so the original consolidation feature now meets its required behavior.
